questions.q: Which president served as a professor of constitutional law before his political career began?

choices: The Pendleton Civil Service Reform Act

questions.q: Which president's Vice President later became president himself, making them the only such pairing in U.S. history?
choices: Andrew Jackson and Martin Van Buren
Warren G. Harding and Calvin Coolidge
